title: Lybrate International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Lybrate International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lybrate International Enterprises family as a Full Stack Developer in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lybrate International Enterprises:
Lybrate International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate International Enterprises!
